name: workflow-phase-redesign
title: W3: Workflow Phase Redesign
description: Rethink how phases work — better exploration, smarter review, research-first paths. Covers explore phase clarity, plan mode redesign, review timing, open question resolution, Phase B finding handling, advisory notes as asks, work-research support, first-class research/design loop, and adversarial-eval improvements.

assessment.rationale: 9 distinct work items spanning explore, plan, review, and research phases. New subsystems needed (research loop, explore pushback, plan-mode redesign). Touches command files, step logic, prompt templates, and state schema.
